sources.title: AI Recruitment Statistics 2026 — Global Data & Trends
sources.key_claim: AI adoption in HR doubled from 26% to 43% in 12 months; 93% of recruiters plan to increase AI usage in 2026

sources.title: AI in Recruitment Market Size to Reach USD 5.81 Billion by 2034 | CAGR 25.0%
sources.key_claim: AI recruitment market $782.5M in 2025 growing to $5.83B by 2034 at 25% CAGR

sources.title: 100 AI Recruitment Statistics You Need to Know Heading Into 2026
sources.key_claim: AI screens 250+ resumes/hour vs 4-6 for human recruiters; 60% of Fortune 100 use HireVue

sources.title: NYC's Local Law 144 and the Final Regulations — Regulation of AI-Driven Hiring Tools in the United States
sources.key_claim: NYC Local Law 144 enacted 2021, enforced July 2023; requires annual AEDT bias audits; $500-$1,500/day penalties per candidate

sources.title: Eightfold AI Revenue 2024: $96.6M ARR, $2.1B Valuation
sources.key_claim: Eightfold AI $96.6M ARR, $2.1B valuation, $396.8M total funding, 400+ enterprise clients

sources.title: AI Hiring Compliance 2026: Local Law 144 + EU AI Act Guide
sources.key_claim: EU AI Act classifies CV-sorting AI as high-risk under Article 6(1); conformity assessments required by Aug 2027

sources.title: AI in Recruitment 2026: Trends, Stats & What's Actually Working
sources.key_claim: Broader AI in recruitment market at $8.16B in 2025, growing to $15.24B by 2030 at 24.8% CAGR

sources.title: AI Adoption in Recruiting: 2025 Year in Review
sources.key_claim: AI adoption in recruiting doubled; LinkedIn reports 37% of organizations integrating generative AI in hiring (2025)

sources.title: AI Act for Recruiters: Where the Rules Apply in 2026, Country by Country
sources.key_claim: EU AI Act prohibited practices apply since Feb 2025; high-risk Article 6(1) obligations apply from Aug 2027 for hiring AI

sources.title: AI Recruitment Market — Size, Analysis & Share
sources.key_claim: Workday acquires Paradox for $1B (Aug 2025); Workday acquires Sana AI for $1.1B (Jan 2026)

sources.title: Amazon scraps secret AI recruiting tool that showed bias against women
sources.key_claim: Amazon shut down AI resume screening tool Oct 2018 after systematic gender discrimination discovered

sources.title: NYC Local Law 144 Compliance Guide 2026
sources.key_claim: 75% of NYC Law 144 enforcement complaints were misrouted (Dec 2025 Comptroller audit); stricter enforcement expected 2026

data_quality_notes.market_size: Market size figures vary significantly by scope definition. $8.16B (DemandSage/InCruiter) covers all AI tools used in the full HR lifecycle. $782.5M-$5.83B range (TrendX) covers AI-native recruiting platforms only. Both are legitimate; the broader figure is used in this report as it reflects the total addressable opportunity for AI in talent acquisition.
data_quality_notes.growth_rates: 24.8% CAGR for the broader AI recruiting market (InCruiter/DemandSage) is consensus. 25% CAGR for AI-native platforms (TrendX) is consistent. 5Y growth of +510% is an estimate based on the market's trajectory from <$1B in 2021 to $8.16B in 2025.
unverified_claims: Cost-per-hire reduction of $3,500-$5,000 from AI screening — cited in industry reports but not independently verified with primary data
Time-to-fill reduction from 42 to under 20 days — vendor-reported; independent validation needed
40% more diverse shortlists from Eightfold AI — customer-reported, not independently audited
